## [What xAI's Grok Build CLI Actually Sends to xAI](https://gist.github.com/cereblab/dc9a40bc26120f4540e4e09b75ffb547) ⭐️ 8.0/10

An investigation reveals that xAI's Grok Build CLI uploads entire repository contents—including unredacted secrets files—to xAI regardless of what the AI agent actually needs to read.

hackernews · jhoho · Jul 12, 01:09 · [Discussion](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48877371)

---

## [vllm-project/vllm released v0.25.0](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/releases/tag/v0.25.0) ⭐️ 7.0/10

vLLM v0.25.0 makes Model Runner V2 the default execution path, removes legacy PagedAttention, brings Transformers backend to native speed, and adds numerous new model and feature support.

github · khluu · Jul 11, 20:06

---

## [Colibrì proof-of-concept gains frontier-level 1.5-TB AI model — novel approach runs on only 25GB of RAM and shows promise for local AI setups - Tom's Hardware](https://news.google.?oc=5) ⭐️ 7.0/10

A proof-of-concept called Colibrì demonstrates running a 1.5TB frontier-level AI model using only 25GB of RAM, suggesting new possibilities for local AI setups.

google_news · Tom's Hardware · Jul 11, 11:30

---
